title: How to Start Coding
content:
How to Start Coding

Coding is easier than it looks. Start with HTML, then move to CSS and JavaScript.

Practice consistently and build small projects to improve your skills over time.

title: Building Your First Website
content:
Building Your First Website

Learn how to structure a basic website. Then style it using modern CSS techniques.

Once you understand the basics, try adding JavaScript for interactivity.

title: Staying Consistent
content:
Staying Consistent

Consistency is key when learning new skills. Practice a little every day to improve.

Small progress each day eventually turns into major improvement.

title: Staying Consistent
content:
Staying Consistent

Consistency is key when learning new skills. Practice a little every day to improve.

Creating routines helps build momentum and confidence.

title: Staying Consistent
content:
Staying Consistent

Consistency is key when learning new skills. Practice a little every day to improve.

Dedication and repetition are important for long-term success.

title: Staying Consistent
content:
Staying Consistent

Consistency is key when learning new skills. Practice a little every day to improve.

Daily practice creates habits that make learning easier.
